headline: E2 raises $80M to market thrombectomy platform
summary: The funding round follows high-profile acquisitions by Boston Scientific and Stryker to pick up mechanical thrombectomy devices for blood clot removal.

raw.headline: E2 raises $80M to market thrombectomy platform
raw.summary: The funding round follows high-profile acquisitions by Boston Scientific and Stryker to pick up mechanical thrombectomy devices for blood clot removal.

headline: CIRCA Scientific Appoints MedTech Executive Vafa Jamali to Board of Directors
summary: CIRCA Scientific today announced the appointment of Vafa Jamali, an accomplished medical technology executive with more than 30 years of industry leadership experience, to its Board of Directors.
